2074432249836032360.full_text:
🚨VIRAT KOHLI'S BRUTAL RESPONSE TO JIMMY'S RETIREMENT QUESTION🚨

Question :- "During the India vs England match, what were you and Virat Kohli talking about when play was stopped because of the rain?

James Anderson :-"The rain had stopped the game, and we were walking back towards the dressing room. I jokingly asked Virat, 'So, when are you finally planning to retire?' He said you're older than me, and every year everyone thinks you've retired. Then you show up with the new ball like nothing ever happened. The day you actually retire.. maybe I'll start thinking about mine. we both had a good laugh.
